description: Four-speaker morning sync scheduling three events with different attendee combinations: client presentation, technical deep dive, and two one-on-ones.

events.title: Client Presentation

events.title: API Performance Deep Dive

events.title: One-on-One

mock_llm_response.summary: Found 4 events: client presentation, API deep dive, and two one-on-ones on different days.

notes: Reference datetime is Friday 2026-02-20. Monday=Feb 23, Tuesday=Feb 24, Wednesday=Feb 25, Thursday=Feb 26. Dave's one-on-one already happened on the reference Friday, so it is not created.
